---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, workflow, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What's the problem?

<!-- What workflow do you want to accomplish? What's currently painful or impossible? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- A new tool? A new scope filter on an existing one? A composite workflow? A new resource doc? A prompt template? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Anything you've tried that didn't work, or other shapes the solution could take. -->

## Would this require a new GraphQL query/mutation?

<!-- Check src/generated/schema.graphql — if the operation already exists in the public API, this is usually a thin add. If not, it's a bigger lift and may require Coalesce/Castor to expand the public API first. -->

- [ ] Yes — new API surface required
- [ ] No — existing API, just needs a wrapper
- [ ] Unsure

## Additional context

<!-- Links to relevant docs, example inputs/outputs, related tools, etc. -->
